name: Shandong Sito Bio-technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Sito Bio-technology Co., Ltd. researches and develops new steroid hormones, intermediates, and derivatives. Its products include cortisone acetate, ethylene deltenone, norandrostenedione, lactone, anecortave acetate, tetraene acetate, hydroxyprogesterone, and androstenedione. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Heze, China.
